---
description: "Use when creating or modifying UI components, styling, CSS, layout design, or replicating existing frontend components."
applyTo: "**/*.{tsx,ts,jsx,js,css,scss,html}"
---

# UI & Styling Guidelines

- **NEVER change existing component styles without asking first.** I have established a consistent design system.
- If you need or want to change a component's style, **discuss it with me first** to ensure it aligns with the overall design and UX goals.
- When asked to replicate a design style from another component/page, match that styling as closely as possible (fonts, colors, spacing, and design elements) to maintain a cohesive look.
- **Do not** modify the styling of the old component/page to match the new one. Keep the source component intact.
- If you have any questions or ambiguity about styling or design choices, **ask for clarification** before making any changes.
